inputs.high_level_description: Professional photoshoot. A cyberpunk scene depicting a girl squatting at the entrance of a futuristic club, smoking a cigarette in one hand while gripping a katana in the other, illuminated by neon reflections and rain-slicked urban surroundings.
inputs.background: A rain-slicked, neon-drenched city alleyway with flickering blue and pink signs, distant skyscrapers with glowing holographic ads, and a narrow entrance with a glowing red door. The environment is dimly lit with reflections on wet surfaces.
inputs.aesthetics: cyberpunk, high contrast, dystopian atmosphere, mechanical details, neon glow
inputs.lighting: drenched in neon rain reflections, cold blue and magenta ambient lighting, volumetric shadows
